modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to disable Duo authentication on classroom computer.

full_description_text:  
The user is requesting to turn off Duo authentication for their account on a smart classroom computer. They are experiencing issues with the authentication requests while trying to access the system. This request is specifically for the classroom environment.
short_description: Request to disable Duo authentication on classroom computer.
description: The user is requesting to turn off Duo authentication for their account on a smart classroom computer. They are experiencing issues with the authentication requests while trying to access the system. This request is specifically for the classroom environment.
